component.name: Boulder Relay
component.summary: GTK4 IRC client for Fedora, RHEL, and Rocky Linux communities

description.p: Boulder Relay is a GTK4 IRC client written in Rust using relm4. It provides a clean desktop interface for connecting to Libera.Chat with TLS, NickServ authentication, multi-channel chat, and live user lists.

Default channels include Rocky Linux (#rockylinux*), Fedora (#fedora, #fedora-devel), and RHEL (#rhel-devel). Settings are saved between sessions, chat includes timestamps and nick highlights, and slash commands such as /join, /part, /clear, and /msg are supported.
Persist custom channels, improve join parsing for any Libera channel, and add Fedora 44 COPR builds.
Add Fedora and RHEL default channels, grouped sidebar sections, and community color accents.
Fix white GNOME title bar by loading theme CSS after GTK init and replacing default window decorations.
Dark custom title bar, Gruvbox theme polish, nick highlights, /clear /part /help, and last channel restore.
Added persistent settings, disconnect control, timestamps, slash commands, and EL10 support.
